prompt:
Create a cinematic character design board for a premium drama film.

A stunning female protagonist with sharp yet gentle facial features, glowing natural skin, and a high-fashion silk gown with modern sculpted design. Minimalistic luxury jewelry enhances her refined look.

Include: full-body turnaround sheets, facial expression variations, cinematic portrait angles, fabric physics study, makeup breakdown, annotation notes, and height reference scale.

Mood: clean studio lighting, modern editorial fashion aesthetic, soft shadows, luxury magazine tone.
